text:
A miniature world, crafted in rose gold. 

The Oil Pump 43MM by Jacob & Co. reimagines the automaton with cinematic precision. Activated at 1:30, the derricks come alive — a hypnotic rhythm mirroring real oil fields. 

Beneath it all, the JCAM53 caliber delivers both technical mastery and visual drama, anchored by a flying tourbillon that defies convention. 

Complexity, elevated into art.

43-mm rose gold case
Drill-site & derrick automaton
Flying tourbillon
Green hour and minute dial with Eastern Arabic numerals

#jacobandco #inspiredbytheimpossible

A miniature world, crafted in rose gold. 

The Oil Pump 43MM by Jacob & Co. reimagines the automaton with cinematic precision. Activated at 1:30, the derricks come alive — a hypnotic rhythm mirroring real oil fields. 

Beneath it all, the JCAM53 caliber delivers both technical mastery and visual drama, anchored by a flying tourbillon that defies convention. 

Complexity, elevated into art.

Oil Pump 43MM
43-mm rose gold case
Drill-site & derrick automaton
Flying tourbillon
Green hour and minute dial with Eastern Arabic numerals

#jacobandco #inspridebytheimpossible

Where engineering meets storytelling. 

The Oil Pump by Jacob & Co. transforms a rare horological complication into a living scene — a fully animated oil rig in constant motion. Powered by the JCAM53 caliber, every detail serves a purpose, every movement tells a story. 

A flying tourbillon suspended above the dial. A derrick that breathes life into mechanics. This isn’t just watchmaking — it’s narrative in motion.

Oil Pump 43MM
43-mm rose gold case
Drill-site & derrick automaton
Flying tourbillon
Green hour and minute dial with Eastern Arabic numerals

#jacobandco #inspredbytheimpossible

A tribute to nature’s most luminous display. Brilliant Skeleton Northern Lights translates the dance of solar light into a radiant skeleton watch, enhanced with shimmering mineral crystals or transparent crystal clarity.

Versatile by design, it exists as both a wristwatch and pendant—crafted to shine in every form.

42-mm green aluminum case
Pavé-set with 252 brilliant-cut tsavorites (~ 8.9 ct.)
Translucent green open dial
Hand-wound skeleton movement

#Jacobandco #Inspiredbytheimpossible

Introduced as part of a bold vision for modern femininity, Brilliant Skeleton Northern Lights reimagines watch design without lugs, borders, or limits. Its skeletonized form is illuminated by colored mineral crystals inspired by the Northern Lights—transforming a natural phenomenon into a living composition of light and movement.

42-mm green aluminum case
Pavé-set with 252 brilliant-cut tsavorites (~ 8.9 ct.)
Translucent green open dial
Hand-wound skeleton movement

#Jacobandco #Inspiredbytheimpossible

Born from the sky’s most hypnotic spectacle, Brilliant Skeleton Northern Lights captures the magic of a phenomenon that feels almost unreal.

Pavé-set with shimmering mineral crystals, its colors echo the movement of light across polar skies—fluid, radiant, and endlessly captivating. A timepiece designed to glow, whether worn on the wrist or as a pendant.

42-mm green aluminum case
Pavé-set with 252 brilliant-cut tsavorites (~ 8.9 ct.)
Translucent green open dial
Hand-wound skeleton movement

#Jacobandco #Inspiredbytheimpossible

A triumph of mechanical ingenuity, the Astronomia Regulator pushes the boundaries of contemporary watchmaking. Its sculptural 3D movement comes to life through a counter-clockwise rotating seconds ring and a double-axis flying tourbillon, delivering constant motion and absolute precision. 

Enhanced by a patented constant force mechanism, this creation unites traditional horological mastery with Jacob & Co.’s unmistakable spirit of innovation.

43-mm rose gold case
Full movement rotation in 60 seconds
Double-axis flying tourbillon
Rotating & separate hour and minute dials

#Jacobandco #Inspiredbytheimpossible

A masterpiece of technical artistry, the Astronomia Regulator redefines timekeeping.

With its mesmerizing 3D rotating movement, counter-clockwise spinning seconds ring, and double-axis flying tourbillon, every detail is engineered for precision.

Featuring a patented constant force device, this timepiece merges classic horology with Jacob & Co.'s signature innovation.

43-mm rose gold case
Full movement rotation in 60 seconds
Double-axis flying tourbillon
Rotating & separate hour and minute dials

#Jacobandco #Inspiredbytheimpossible

Take time to the next dimension. The Astronomia Regulator by Jacob & Co. combines a patented constant force mechanism, vertical movement, and unparalleled design. A new way to see every second—bold, clear, and unforgettable.

43-mm rose gold case
Full movement rotation in 60 seconds
Double-axis flying tourbillon
Rotating & separate hour and minute dials

#JacobandCo #InspiredByTheImpossible

A world shaped by time.

The World Is Yours Dual Time Zone is housed in a 44-mm 18K rose gold case, featuring a 3D green world map dial with Eastern Arabic numerals. Inside, a self-winding movement powers double, independent hours and minutes—crafted for a life without borders.

44-mm 18K rose gold case
3D green world map dial with Eastern Arabic numerals
Self-winding movement
Double, independent hours and minutes

#JacobAndCo #InspiredByTheImpossible

Time, doubled. Perspective, global.

The World Is Yours Dual Time Zone pairs a 44-mm 18K rose gold case with a striking 3D green world map dial.

A self-winding movement drives two independent time displays, offering complete control of hours and minutes—wherever life takes you.

44-mm 18K rose gold case
3D green world map dial with Eastern Arabic numerals
Self-winding movement
Double, independent hours and minutes

#JacobAndCo #InspiredByTheImpossible

Two time zones. One statement.

The World Is Yours Dual Time Zone in a 44-mm 18K rose gold case features a sculpted 3D green world map dial with Eastern Arabic numerals.

Powered by a self-winding movement, with double, fully independent hours and minutes—designed for those who move across worlds with precision.

44-mm 18K rose gold case
3D green world map dial with Eastern Arabic numerals
Self-winding movement
Double, independent hours and minutes

#JacobAndCo #InspiredByTheImpossible
